action.reasoning: Observation: Best PESQ stuck at 3.137 (MetricGAN+ + fixed -25 LUFS norm); val PESQ flat at 2.862 across all post-processing strategies (fixed, match-noisy, mean-clean, iterative); train.py remains dummy (just copies pretrained, writes fake metrics); no real model training in 13 iterations. Analysis: Post-processing exhausted (PESQ invariant to loudness in broad range); to improve need supervised training of SE-specific model. Asteroid.ConvTasNet (~8M params) + auraloss.SISDRLoss is lightweight, pre-installed, and directly applicable; chunked dataset enables fast iterations. Updated predict.py will load ConvTasNet from .pt checkpoint (keep loudness norm for consistency). 3 epochs on subsampled chunks + small val for initial time measurement/baseline (expect initial val PESQ ~1.5-2.2, will improve in future iters). Decision: Rewrite train.py (ConvTasNet training loop, dataset, logging to metrics.jsonl, save best.pt) and predict.py (load ConvTasNet + loudness from best_loudness.txt); execute training then submit_eval immediately for official score + per-iter time measurement before scaling epochs.
